pageContext.name: Six
pageContext.description: The iconic moment when Six uses her lighter to illuminate the darkness of the vessel is faithfully recreated.  A stark contrast of light and dark was used with the paint to highlight the way the light hits Six and emphasizes the creepy intense air of the game. Her face, which is hardly seen during gameplay, is thoroughly sculpted in tight detail. In spite of this mini size, the sculpture captures all the wrinkles and stitches on her characteristic yellow raincoat, creating a realistic piece.  The candle which acts as the save point in the game along with books that are sometimes used as step ladders are captured on the base. Both are essential items for Six.  'Little Nightmares' is a horror adventure game starring Six a little girl who's trying to escape the massive vessel Maw, using her courage and wisdom. The heroine Six, and the strange and horrible residents by her side are recreated as palm-sized mini figures. Symbolic props for each character adorn the detailed diorama bases, capturing the wonderful and weird atmosphere of the game.  Be Sure to add this figure to your collection today!
